blended.narrative: Lost Trail is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.5 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,101 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 55".
